questions.question: I ___ playing games yesterday at 3pm. (過去進行形)
questions.explanation: 過去進行形は was/were + -ing です

questions.question: I ___ playing games tomorrow at 3pm. (未来進行形)
questions.explanation: 未来進行形は will be + -ing です

questions.question: I ___ studying English now. (現在進行形)
questions.explanation: 現在進行形は am/is/are + -ing です

questions.question: She ___ studying English yesterday. (過去進行形)
questions.explanation: 過去進行形は was/were + -ing です

questions.question: They ___ writing letters tomorrow. (未来進行形)
questions.explanation: 未来進行形は will be + -ing です

questions.question: He ___ playing soccer now. (現在進行形)
questions.explanation: 現在進行形は am/is/are + -ing です

questions.question: We ___ watching TV yesterday evening. (過去進行形)
questions.explanation: 過去進行形は was/were + -ing です

questions.question: You ___ reading a book now. (現在進行形)
questions.explanation: 現在進行形は am/is/are + -ing です
